name: svg-with-script
description: SVG carrying an inline <script>, an onload event handler, a foreignObject, and a javascript: href. SVG's XML attack surface is real executable content when rendered inline. F-13: the normaliser RASTERISES SVG to PNG (vector -> bitmap via librsvg), which drops every script / handler / foreignObject / external ref because none of it survives the decode. The stored mime becomes image/png; the served bytes carry no markup at all.
